name: The Real Forecast Model
tagline: Not a template that looks like a forecast. A model that actually does the math.
format: Excel (.xlsx) — works in Excel or Google Sheets
differentiator: Every number is a real formula, linked three sheets deep. Change one assumption and the entire 3-year forecast recalculates — correctly, to the penny.
description: A fully linked 3-year financial model built the way real forecasts are built — revenue assumptions flow into your P&L, your P&L flows into cash flow, cash flow flows into a balance sheet that actually balances to $0 every year. No macros, no lock-outs, fully editable.
whatsInside: Assumptions tab — every input in one place, color-coded
Cash Flow — know exactly when you'll be tight on cash
Balance Sheet — balances to $0, every year
Break-Even Analysis — exact revenue and month
Investor Summary — one printable page, auto-populated
whoFor: Founders applying for a loan, pitching investors, or tired of guessing whether their business math actually works.
